title: Aetherium: Steam & Shadow
subtitle: Steampunk RTS Battle Game
description: Lead the steam-powered Alchemical Empire against the invading Gothic Necromancy Crypt Horde in this browser-based real-time strategy combat game. Battle for control of central Aether Geysers, research advanced technologies, and deploy the colossal Gilded Behemoth to secure your keep and claim victory!

title: Global Elections Model
subtitle: A correlation study between global events and election results
description: This elections research project aims to predict election results based off of prevailing global patterns rather than race-specific polling. The project uses the Global Database of Events, Language, and Tone, but does not include any specifics on candidate quality or even the political leaning of different parties. Instead, the model hopes to predict when people want a change in their national government. Currently, the model sits around 70% accuracy.
